title: jupyterTooling
description: jupyterTooling settings for workspace tooling integration.

storageCheckEnabled.title: Enable Storage Check
storageCheckEnabled.description: Check storage usage on extension activation and show warnings when limits are exceeded.

toolsMenuEnabled.title: Enable Tools Menu
toolsMenuEnabled.description: Show the Open Tool dropdown menu in the header.

notebookToolbarEnabled.title: Enable Notebook Toolbar
notebookToolbarEnabled.description: Show Git Commit button in notebook toolbar.

fileBrowserEnabled.title: Enable File Browser Integration
fileBrowserEnabled.description: Show Git buttons in file browser toolbar.
